signals.npcLine: Market pulse flickers—cryptos breathing but shadows grow.
signals.questPulse: Scan dark nodes for hidden blockchain uprisings.
signals.worldFeed: Global digital assets barely stirring amid rising distrust.
signals.clueEvent: Data leaks suggest info brokers trading phantom coins.

signals.npcLine: OPG networks spike; watchdogs scramble in neon back alleys.
signals.questPulse: Infiltrate cyber vaults squeezing bursts from OPG's core.
signals.worldFeed: Emerging tokens ignite underground ops, whispers of surge.
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted chatter hints at pump schemes in shadow markets.

signals.npcLine: Silent whispers: CHIP nodes flicker, ghosts in the grid.
signals.questPulse: Trace signal anomalies in CHIP’s fading broadcast.
signals.worldFeed: Low signal on minor tokens, hopeful or hopeless bets.
signals.clueEvent: Algorithmic trails reveal possible info tampering.

signals.npcLine: PENGU and RAVE surge; scavengers seek tech relics behind fame.
signals.questPulse: Hunt artifacts from recent token spikes in neon ruins.
signals.worldFeed: Forgotten coins awaken sparks of interest in old sectors.
signals.clueEvent: Odd trade volumes stir rumors of hidden tech trades.

signals.npcLine: AAVE’s shadow lingers; info dealers whisper in dark corners.
signals.questPulse: Meet with shady contacts for insider whispers on AAVE.
signals.worldFeed: Suspicious silence around certain tokens fuels market paranoia.
signals.clueEvent: Obscure signals caught on once-popular AAVE channels.
